# aria2-next (vendor placeholder)

Upstream: https://github.com/AnInsomniacy/aria2-next

Add as git submodule:

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/AnInsomniacy/aria2-next.git third_party/aria2-next
git submodule update --init --recursive
```

Or download release binaries with `./tool/fetch_engine.sh`.
